Penpot plugins API
    Preparing search index...
    • TokenSet

    Interface TokenSet

    A collection of Design Tokens.

    Inside a set, tokens have an unique name, that will designate what token to use if the name is applied to a shape and this set is active.

    interface TokenSet {
        id: string;
        name: string;
        active: boolean;
        tokens: Token[];
        tokensByType: [string, Token[]][];
        toggleActive(): void;
        getTokenById(id: string): Token | undefined;
        addToken(
            type: { type: TokenType; name: string; value: TokenValueString },
        ): Token;
        duplicate(): TokenSet;
        remove(): void;
    }
    • Defined in index.d.ts:5071
    Index

    Properties

    id name active tokens tokensByType

    Methods

    toggleActive getTokenById addToken duplicate remove

    Properties

    Readonlyid

    id: string

    The unique identifier for this set, used only internally inside Penpot. This one is not exported or synced with external Design Token sources.

    • Defined in index.d.ts:5076

    name

    name: string

    The name of the set. It may include a group path separated by /.

    • Defined in index.d.ts:5081

    active

    active: boolean

    Indicates if the set is currently active.

    • Defined in index.d.ts:5086

    Readonlytokens

    tokens: Token[]

    The tokens contained in this set, in alphabetical order.

    • Defined in index.d.ts:5091

    ReadonlytokensByType

    tokensByType: [string, Token[]][]

    The tokens contained in this set, grouped by type.

    • Defined in index.d.ts:5096

    Methods

    toggleActive

    • toggleActive(): void

      Toggles the active status of this set.

      Returns void

      • Defined in index.d.ts:5101

    getTokenById

    • getTokenById(id: string): Token | undefined

      Retrieves a token.

      Parameters

      • id: string

        the id of the token.

      Returns Token | undefined

      Returns the token or undefined if not found.

      • Defined in index.d.ts:5108

    addToken

    • addToken(
          type: { type: TokenType; name: string; value: TokenValueString },
      ): Token

      Creates a new Token and adds it to the set.

      Parameters

      • type: { type: TokenType; name: string; value: TokenValueString }

        Thetype of token.

      Returns Token

      Returns the created Token.

      • Defined in index.d.ts:5118

    duplicate

    • duplicate(): TokenSet

      Adds to the catalog a new TokenSet equal to this one but with a new id.

      Returns TokenSet

      • Defined in index.d.ts:5131

    remove

    • remove(): void

      Removes this set from the catalog.

      Returns void
